view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of payment going to the wrong business.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a scenario where a payment goes to the wrong business, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or results from this scenario. While the linked use case describes a multi-location business, it does not provide concrete evidence or outcomes related to the payment process or error handling in such cases. Therefore, the lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive verdict regarding the validation of this scenario.
